name: Banished Knight
short_description: The 'Banished Knight' is a 3D top-down action Roguelike game. The story takes place after Ragnarok, where the player, as a heroic knight, must travel to Svartalfheim to battle various types of monsters, collect resources, unlock new weapons,and repair the Valkyrie statue.
detailed_description:
Game Introduction

Pure, hardcore, and fun, 'Banished Knight' is a top-down action roguelike game. You will play as an undead knight, traversing the underground world, defeating enemies to collect resources, and repairing the Valkyrie statues damaged in Ragnarok to restore power.

Classic Combat Design

Perhaps you, like me, are tired of the mechanical combat interaction and the value design filled with pay-to-win traps.

Action games are more than just attacks and dodges; it's the decisions made in split seconds that make them enjoyable.

In the face of a relentless barrage of attacks, you can choose to spawn different moves from your attack actions to parry incoming strikes, or generate movement-based actions to evade attacks and immediately counterattack.

Every moment, you have many options.

Game Features

Lowpoly art style, cartoon scenes

21 types of weapons to experience

Multiple system construction routes to explore

Flexible move derivation design, easy to learn but hard to master

Words from the Author

Hello everyone, I am the producer MarxAB, an ordinary game industry practitioner.

I have a unique fondness and aesthetic for action games, and I have always wanted to create a highly replayable action game that satisfies me. I am very much looking forward to receiving your opinions and suggestions, and I will continuously improve the game content.

Future development plans will also be synchronized in the group

Official communication QQ group:

977717286
